'''fachubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avdp|avdp]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avdp|avdp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fachubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæchibith|fæchibith]] || [[word:fæchibij|fæchibij]] || [[word:fæchibish|fæchibish]] || [[word:fæchibi|fæchibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fachuchubuth|fachuchubuth]] || [[word:fachuchubuj|fachuchubuj]] || [[word:fachuchubush|fachuchubush]] || [[word:fachuchubu|fachuchubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fachubuth|fachubuth]] || [[word:fachubuj|fachubuj]] || [[word:fachubush|fachubush]] || [[word:fachubu|fachubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fachufbuth|fachufbuth]] || [[word:fachufbuj|fachufbuj]] || [[word:fachufbush|fachufbush]] || [[word:fachufbuf|fachufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fachubuthu|fachubuthu]] || [[word:fachubuju|fachubuju]] || [[word:fachubushu|fachubushu]] || [[word:fachubuku|fachubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fachubuth|fachubuth]] || [[word:fachubuj|fachubuj]] || [[word:fachubush|fachubush]] || [[word:fachubu|fachubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fachubuthul|fachubuthul]] || [[word:fachubujul|fachubujul]] || [[word:fachubushul|fachubushul]] || [[word:fachubukul|fachubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fachubuthuthu|fachubuthuthu]] || [[word:fachubujuju|fachubujuju]] || [[word:fachubushushu|fachubushushu]] || [[word:fachubuku|fachubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fachubuthun|fachubuthun]] || [[word:fachubujun|fachubujun]] || [[word:fachubushun|fachubushun]] || [[word:fachubukun|fachubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fachubuthuoro|fachubuthuoro]] || [[word:fachubujuoro|fachubujuoro]] || [[word:fachubushuoro|fachubushuoro]] || [[word:fachubukuoro|fachubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
